title: Listening - Part 1
description: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1–6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best.
instructions: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1–6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear. There are two questions for each extract.

extracts.context: You hear two friends discussing a new historical drama series on TV.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: So, are you enjoying 'The Crown’s Shadow'? I think the actress playing the Queen is phenomenal. || Man: She’s good, but [1]I found the script to be a bit too heavy on the exposition[/1]. Characters keep explaining things to each other that they would obviously already know. || Woman: I see what you mean. It’s for the benefit of the audience, but it does feel forced. || Man: [2]What I really liked, though, was the attention to detail in the costume design[/2]. The embroidery on those coronation robes was just exquisite. || Woman: It is visually stunning. It’s just a shame the pacing in the middle episodes is so sluggish. || Man: I agree. I almost gave up during episode four.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: So, are you enjoying 'The Crown’s Shadow'? I think the actress playing the Queen is phenomenal.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: She’s good, but I found the script to be a bit too heavy on the exposition. Characters keep explaining things to each other that they would obviously already know.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I see what you mean. It’s for the benefit of the audience, but it does feel forced.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What I really liked, though, was the attention to detail in the costume design. The embroidery on those coronation robes was just exquisite.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: It is visually stunning. It’s just a shame the pacing in the middle episodes is so sluggish.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I agree. I almost gave up during episode four.

questions.question: What is the man's main criticism of the dialogue?

options.B: It is used unnaturally to provide background info.
options.C: It is difficult to hear over the music.

questions.explanation: He finds the script 'heavy on the exposition' where characters explain obvious things [1].

questions.question: What aspect of the show did the man particularly admire?

options.B: the historical authenticity of the plot

questions.explanation: He praises the 'attention to detail in the costume design' [2].

extracts.context: You hear two colleagues talking about a change to the office kitchen rules.
extracts.audio_script: Man: I can't believe they’ve banned personal mugs in the staff kitchen. We have to use those identical grey ones now. || Woman: [3]I suspect it’s more about creating a 'uniform corporate look' for when clients visit[/3] than any actual hygiene issue. || Man: It’s so impersonal. I miss my 'World’s Best Dad' mug. || Woman: [4]I’ve noticed that people are already being much lazier about washing up[/4] because they don't feel any ownership over the office cups. The sink is always full now. || Man: That’s a fair point. If it’s everyone’s cup, it’s no one’s responsibility. || Woman: Exactly. It’s a minor thing, but it’s definitely had a negative impact on the general mood in the mornings.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I can't believe they’ve banned personal mugs in the staff kitchen. We have to use those identical grey ones now.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I suspect it’s more about creating a 'uniform corporate look' for when clients visit than any actual hygiene issue.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: It’s so impersonal. I miss my 'World’s Best Dad' mug.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I’ve noticed that people are already being much lazier about washing up because they don't feel any ownership over the office cups. The sink is always full now.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That’s a fair point. If it’s everyone’s cup, it’s no one’s responsibility.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Exactly. It’s a minor thing, but it’s definitely had a negative impact on the general mood in the mornings.

questions.question: The woman believes the new rule was motivated by

options.B: the desire to project a professional image.
options.C: a need to reduce the amount of clutter.

questions.explanation: She thinks it's about a 'uniform corporate look' for clients [3].

questions.question: What negative consequence of the rule has the woman observed?

options.B: a lack of care for the shared equipment
options.C: a rise in disagreements between staff

questions.explanation: She notes people are 'lazier about washing up' because they don't feel 'ownership' [4].

extracts.context: You hear two people discussing a new mobile fitness game.
extracts.audio_script: Man: I’ve been playing that 'Zombie-Run' game to motivate myself to go jogging. It’s actually quite terrifying! || Woman: [5]I found the narrative a bit too distracting when I was trying to focus on my pace[/5]. I kept slowing down to hear the dialogue. || Man: I see your point. It does demand a lot of attention. || Woman: [6]I did think the GPS tracking was incredibly precise, though[/6]. It even caught the moment I crossed the street to avoid a puddle. || Man: I agree, it’s a lot more accurate than my old fitness watch. Though I wish it didn't drain my battery so quickly. || Woman: Yeah, you definitely need a full charge before you head out, or you’ll be stranded in the middle of nowhere.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I’ve been playing that 'Zombie-Run' game to motivate myself to go jogging. It’s actually quite terrifying!

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I found the narrative a bit too distracting when I was trying to focus on my pace. I kept slowing down to hear the dialogue.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I see your point. It does demand a lot of attention.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I did think the GPS tracking was incredibly precise, though. It even caught the moment I crossed the street to avoid a puddle.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I agree, it’s a lot more accurate than my old fitness watch. Though I wish it didn't drain my battery so quickly.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yeah, you definitely need a full charge before you head out, or you’ll be stranded in the middle of nowhere.

questions.question: The woman suggests that the game's story

options.A: was not engaging enough to keep her interested.
options.C: was too frightening for some users.

questions.explanation: She found the narrative 'distracting' and it made her slow down her pace [5].

questions.question: Both speakers were impressed by the game's
questions.explanation: They both praise the 'precise' and 'accurate' GPS tracking [6].
